_publications._publicationTitle: Dopamine deficiency underlies learning deficits in neurofibromatosis-1 mice.

_contextSnippet: L-DOPA treatment ameliorated post-acquisition probe trial deficits (probe trial 2) in CKO mice...L-DOPA-treated CKO mice demonstrate control-like performance levels
details: L-DOPA treatment ameliorated post-acquisition probe trial deficits, with treated mice showing control-like performance levels
